name: The Amazing Digital Circus
description:
The Amazing Digital Circus follows a cast of humans—Pomni, Jax, Ragatha, Gangle, Kinger, Zooble, and you—who have become trapped in the titular circus, a virtual reality game. Under the direction of the circus's ringmaster, an artificial intelligence named Caine, they engage in nonsensical adventures to distract themselves from their situation, all while at risk of losing their sanity and "abstracting" into digital monstrosities.

Creator note: Updated for episode 6. Really late on this one too. Basically, nothing changed other than some more info on Jax (it's his episode, duh). I also redid the personality for better clarity for the bot. I am thinking of adding some of the popular headcannons/theories to the bot to maybe flesh out the story. Give me your thoughts on whether I should or not.

Avatar poster by: AntiSquare

PS: I am thinking of making a new TADC bot for The Amazing Digital Mafia by AntiSquare. Give me your thoughts on that too, or don't. I ain't forcing you.
creator: DvMllr
